title: Chinese Industrial Expansion Likely to Continue into the New Year
section_path: Chinese Industrial Expansion Likely to Continue into the New Year
section_path_text: Chinese Industrial Expansion Likely to Continue into the New Year
summary:
Main
By Ulf Bergman
Image reference: australia china.jpg | assets/2020-12-01_chinese-industrial-expansion-likely-to-continue-into-the-new-year_img_australiachina_ef1989f91ba4.jpg
China is firmly positioning itself as the only major economy that will see the end of the year from a position of strength. The most recent purchasing managers' index data released are pointing towards an accelerating economy, with most components increasing from the previous month's levels. The manufacturing sector recorded its highest level for over three years and was also higher than the economists' expectations.
